entry.title: IDC W56HZV13D0008 (P00190) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS LAND SYSTEMS INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00190 IS A BILATERAL MODIFICATION TO REVISE ATTACHMENT 0092 TO INCORPOATE PRICING FOR RWS OVER-PACK AND FY14 SOFTWARE.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, WHEELED

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV13D0008 (P00197) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS LAND SYSTEMS INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION AMENDS ATTACHMENT 0100 BY ADDING A NEW UNIT LOCATION WITH 2 MONTHS OF GARRISON MAINTENANCE SERVICE. ALSO, THIS LOCATION IS ADDED TO ATTACHMENT 0028.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, WHEELED

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV13D0008 (P00198) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS LAND SYSTEMS INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: BILATERAL MOD TO EXTEND THE THIRD ORDERING PERIOD FOR DVH STRYKER EXCHANGE VEHICLES WHICH EXPIRES ON 31 OCTOBER 2015. THE PROPOSED EXTENSION IS AN ADDITIONAL FOUR MONTHS (1 NOV 2015 TO 29 FEB 2016) WHICH ALLOWS PMO SBCT TO ORDER THE 18 MEVVS AND ENGINEERING SUPPORT IN PRODUCTION (ESIP) NEEDED TO COMPLETE THE 3RD STRYKER DVH BDE.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, WHEELED

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
